data.name: Home.Hero.Title
data.value: A calmer, clearer way to run identity and operations for animal centers.

data.name: Home.Hero.Copy
data.value: Beagl gives teams a focused operational surface for account management and day-to-day administration. Jump directly into users, keep workflows consistent, and maintain visibility across account health.

data.name: Home.Highlight.Workspace.Copy
data.value: Create, inspect, edit, and remove users without switching contexts.

data.name: Home.Highlight.Clarity.Copy
data.value: Status indicators and focused panels keep critical account actions readable.

data.name: Home.Highlight.Teams.Copy
data.value: Responsive interactions support desktop and mobile usage for busy centers.
